people.note: Tier A subject from P1_S06. Often appears in prose as the pair "Bayne and Frances" with Frances Cobb, his wife.
Tier A subject from P1_S08. Shorter phrases "Blue and Ruby" and "Blue Cole" refer to the same neighbors, Blue and Ruby Cole.
Tier A subject from P1_S36. Also referred to as "Charlie Brumfield" in some stories.
Dot Hill is her maiden name—the same person. "Keith and Dot" in the memoir refers to her with Keith Cobb.
Sometimes shortened to "Dr Carter" in the text.
Tier A subject from P1_S07. Often appears paired as "Bayne and Frances" with Bayne Cobb (*his wife).
Tier A subject from P1_S03. "Miss Frances" and "Miss Frances Mallory" refer to this same teacher.
"Madonna and Jim" (and similar transcript variants with Jon/Jim) refer to Jim Madonna.
"Keith and Dot" refers to Keith with Dot Cobb (née Hill).
